nodes.name: Monday 8AM ET Cron
nodes.notes: Fires the weekly run every Monday 08:00 America/New_York (set in workflow timezone).

nodes.name: WS-1 Orchestrate
nodes.notes: Pulls the property list + Podio overrides from Abdul's Postgres (no AppFolio/Podio APIs), ingests QuickBooks CSVs, writes cache/ws1-latest.json. exit 0=SUCCESS, 2=EMPTY, 1=FAILED.

nodes.name: WS-2 Route
nodes.notes: Routing Logic Engine. Routes each property to BGE-pay / Water-pay / Tenant-skip / Exception, writes routing_decision + consumption_anomaly to Postgres and cache/ws2-latest.json. Sends its own batched Outlook ping for consumption anomalies/exceptions.

nodes.name: Continue to WS-3/WS-4
nodes.notes: Placeholder — bill-retrieval runs of the BGE (WS-3) and water (WS-4) agents attach here once their payment-mode hardening lands.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ subject: 'Dominion weekly orchestration FAILED — exitCode ' + $json["exitCode"], severity: 'critical', source: 'WS-1/WS-2 orchestration', run_id: '', body: (($json["stderr"] || $json["stdout"] || 'no output').toString().slice(0, 3000)) }) }}

nodes.name: WS-6 Outlook Alert
nodes.notes: Posts the failure (including the stderr JSON line from the failing script) to the WS-6 Outlook channel: a Power Automate HTTP-trigger flow that emails the ops mailbox. OUTLOOK_WEBHOOK_URL set in the n8n env/credential store. Replaces the former Slack webhook.

nodes.name: Halt Run
nodes.notes: Run halts here on failure — no payment workstreams fire without a clean WS-1 → WS-2 handoff.
